mapper.sql: id, order_no, user_id, product_id, product_code, product_name, product_type, amount_cents, score_amount, gold_coin_amount, vip_type, vip_days, payment_channel, status, created_at, paid_at, updated_at
mapper.select: SELECT FROM app_payment_order WHERE order_no = #{orderNo} LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE app_payment_order SET status = 'PAID', paid_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id} AND status != 'PAID'
